comments.body: you need to sign your commits with DCO.  Consider doing `git commit --amend -s` and force pushing

I've added a release note for you which is part of our submission process.  I set the release note to `None` which means nothing significant.  If you contribute to us again (and I hope you do), then be sure to have that or our CI will not run and evaluate your PR.

Thanks for your first submission to the project!
Is there something left for me to do for this to be merged?
@fiesh Apply the changes you suggested in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26813#discussion_r2276429145 and push again. Then it it looks good to me and can be merged, thanks.
Thanks, can you squash the commits please.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *fiesh*, *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
